methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Space & Aerospace (found 2 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 11 same-sector peers exist in Space & Aerospace, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Space & Aerospace P/S median is 25.8x across 6 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

data.narrative:
ispace is a publicly listed Space & Aerospace company founded by Takeshi Hakamada, having raised $200M+ in total capital. The valuation universe comprises 13 identified peers: 5 public companies (RKLB, PL, LUNR, ASTS, SATL) and 8 private firms including Planet Labs, Astroscale, SpaceX, Sierra Space, and Impulse Space.

Peer-median triangulation is not applicable due to insufficient narrow peer clustering. While 11 same-sector peers exist, filtering by stage, adjacency, and valuation tier yields fewer than 3 datapoints, rendering a subset median unreliable. Public-comp anchoring similarly cannot be executed: the Space & Aerospace public median P/S is 25.8x across the 6-ticker reference set, but ispace's revenue is not on file, precluding revenue-multiple application. The absence of both narrow private comps and target revenue data blocks quantitative calibration.

No triangulated valuation range can be supported without additional data. The analysis identifies structural constraints: ispace occupies a thin public-market segment where comparable companies lack sufficient clustering, and private revenue disclosure remains absent. Resolution requires either disclosure of ispace's fiscal metrics or identification of additional same-stage Space & Aerospace peers with disclosed financials. The 25.8x public sector median offers directional context only and should not be applied without revenue confirmation.
